jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Process Engineer for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates:
Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates!
